<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: filesystem_no_spaces_in_path`

## Purpose

Disallow spaces anywhere in the file path.

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_no_spaces_in_path
```
